subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Trigger 150626873 is not a GRB
submitter: Eric Burns at U of Alabama  <eb0016@uah.edu>
body:
"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 150626873/457045019 at
20:56:56.92 UT on 26 June 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in
fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to particle activity.���
